translation: No! I do swear by this City,
notes: The negation here is of the non-believers’ presumption that there is none in control over them. See Verse 5 below.

translation: – And you are a free citizen of this City –
And by father and that which he begets,
We have certainly created man for hard work.

arabic: أَيَحۡسَبُ أَن لَّن يَقۡدِرَ عَلَيۡهِ أَحَدٞ
transliteration: Ayahsabu an lan yaqdira AAalayhi ahadun
translation: Does he think that no one has any control over him?
He claims, “I have squandered much wealth.”
Does he think no one is keeping a watch on him?
Have We not made two eyes for him,
And a tongue and two lips,
And shown him the two ways [right and wrong]?
But he ventures not up the steep road;
And what do you understand what the steep road is?
Freeing a slave,

arabic: أَوۡ إِطۡعَٰمٞ فِي يَوۡمٖ ذِي مَسۡغَبَةٖ
transliteration: Aw itAAamun fee yawmin thee masghabatin
translation: Or feeding on a day of extreme hunger,
An orphan closely related,
Or miserable poor man.

arabic: ثُمَّ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَتَوَاصَوۡاْ بِٱلصَّبۡرِ وَتَوَاصَوۡاْ بِٱلۡمَرۡحَمَةِ
transliteration: Thumma kana mina allatheena amanoo watawasaw bialssabri watawasaw bialmarhamati
translation: Then he becomes of those who believe and exhort one another to patience and exhort one another to mercy.
These are the people of the right hand.

arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا هُمۡ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡمَشۡـَٔمَةِ
transliteration: Waallatheena kafaroo biayatina hum ashabu almashamati
translation: And those who suppress the Truth in Our Verses, those are the people of the left hand.
On them is Fire closing in.
